title: T-033 — QA-031 inspection_detail page + sample_draw_modal (parity)
prompt:
# T-033 — QA-031 inspection_detail + sample_draw_modal

PRD: 09-QUALITY-PRD.md §8.2 QA-031, §8.3 QUA-104, §8.5 prototypes inspection_detail + sample_draw_modal
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Build `/quality/inspections/incoming/:id` Server Component with top metadata Card, parameter results table (auto-compute pass/fail per row), bottom action bar (Save draft / Submit / Cancel inspection / Create hold on fail), e-sign block. Sample draw modal Client Component for AQL sampling.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/src/app/quality/inspections/incoming/[id]/page.tsx` Server Component reads getInspectionDetail(id) (returns inspection + spec + parameters + results).
2. `apps/web/src/components/quality/inspections/InspectionDetailForm.tsx` Client Component (RHF + Zod) with parameter rows; on each row blur calls recordTestResult (T-027).
3. `apps/web/src/components/quality/inspections/SampleDrawModal.tsx` shadcn Dialog matching prototype quality/modals.jsx:248-297.
4. Action bar: Submit calls completeInspection + signInspection; Create hold opens HoldCreateModal pre-filled with reference_type='lp' and lp_id from inspection.
5. 1:1 parity vs `design/Monopilot Design System/quality/inspection-screens.jsx:100-297` (inspection_detail) and `quality/modals.jsx:248-297` (sample_draw_modal).

## Files
- apps/web/src/app/quality/inspections/incoming/[id]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/getInspectionDetail.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/inspections/InspectionDetailForm.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/inspections/SampleDrawModal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/quality/inspections/__tests__/inspectionDetail.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/quality/inspection-screens.jsx [ref]
- design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/inspection-screens.jsx:100-297, then it has parity with the prototype on structure (top metadata card + parameters table + bottom action bar with 4 buttons in same order Save/Submit/Cancel/CreateHold), visuals (shadcn Card/Table/Input/Select/Button only, signed banner uses Alert variant=success when signed), and interaction (per-row auto-compute on blur, Submit disabled until all critical params have results, Create hold pre-fills lp reference) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
2. Given the SampleDrawModal renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:248-297, then it has parity on structure (header + lot size Input + AQL Select + computed sample size readout + Cancel/Confirm buttons), visuals (shadcn Dialog/Form/Select/Button only), and interaction (Confirm disabled until lot_size>0 AND AQL chosen; sample size auto-computed via getDefaultSamplingPlan) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist
3. Given a parameter is critical and result='fail', when Submit is clicked, then the form prompts the user to enter fail_reason and offers 'Create hold' shortcut routing to HoldCreateModal pre-filled with reference_type='lp' and the inspection's lp_id

pipeline_inputs.description: Inspection detail with parameter rows (auto-compute on blur) + action bar + sample draw modal; parity with inspection_detail and sample_draw_modal prototypes.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Component fetches inspection+spec+parameters+results. Client form (RHF) records per-parameter via recordTestResult on blur. Sample draw modal computes sample size via getDefaultSamplingPlan (T-031). Submit triggers completeInspection + signInspection. Create hold opens HoldCreateModal pre-filled. shadcn primitives only.
out_of_scope: Do not implement P2 in_process/final inspection flows
acceptance_criteria: Given the page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/inspection-screens.jsx:100-297, then it has parity on structure (top metadata card + parameters table + bottom action bar with 4 buttons Save/Submit/Cancel/CreateHold in declared order), visuals (shadcn Card/Table/Input/Select/Button only, signed banner Alert variant=success), and interaction (per-row auto-compute on blur, Submit disabled until all critical params have results, Create hold pre-fills lp reference) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist in pipeline_inputs.details

Given the SampleDrawModal renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/quality/modals.jsx:248-297, then it has parity on structure (header + lot size Input + AQL Select + computed sample-size readout + Cancel/Confirm), visuals (shadcn primitives only), and interaction (Confirm disabled until lot_size>0 AND AQL chosen; sample size auto-computed via getDefaultSamplingPlan) — verified by RTL plus parity checklist

Given a critical parameter result='fail', when Submit is clicked, then the form prompts for fail_reason and offers Create hold shortcut routing to HoldCreateModal pre-filled with reference_type='lp' and the inspection's lp_id
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/components/quality/inspections/__tests__/inspectionDetail.test.tsx asserting structure, sample-size auto-compute, Create-hold pre-fill
risk_red_lines: Do not let client compute the top-level inspection result (server-authoritative per V-QA-INSP-004)
Do not allow Submit while critical params are missing results
Do not skip the auto-create-hold prompt when fail involves a critical parameter
